design_system_rules.borders: 2px solid #111118 (ink) on all cards, buttons, navigation, and inputs.
design_system_rules.shadows: Flat, layered cards. No soft drop shadows. Use hard flat translation shadows if depth is needed, or just rely on the 2px solid borders.

layout.max_width: 480px centered in viewport on larger screens.
layout.bottom_nav: Fixed at bottom, 5 tabs, ink background, lime icon for active, 25% opacity white for inactive. Center tab (+) is raised with lime background for 'Create Game'.

design_system_rules.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

rating_numbers.notes: The single most important visual element. Must be dominant.

headings_and_ctas.notes: Used for card titles, player names, CTA labels.

scores_and_stats.notes: Used for match scores (e.g., 6-2 4-6), stat numbers, timestamps.

rating_badge.description: Large Unbounded 900 lime number on ink background (or ink on cream). Accompanied by a 4px lime bottom bar.

card_header_band.description: Every card has a colored header band (8px high strip or full label row) before content.

cta_button.description: Split design. Main lime button (Unbounded 900 uppercase) + coral arrow tab on right. Separated by a 2px ink border.

stat_chip.description: 4 chips per row. Backgrounds can be white, lime, coral, or blue. Separated by 2px ink borders.

leaderboard_row.layout: Flex row. Rank on left, Name middle, Rating right, Trend arrow extreme right.
leaderboard_row.rank_styling: DM Mono, 42px width, right ink border.

screens.name: Onboarding Step 1 - Identity
screens.description: Introductory screen. Dark mode feel with ink background. High contrast white and lime text. Name and basic identity inputs.
elements: Text Inputs with 2px lime borders on focus

screens.name: Onboarding Step 2 - Experience
screens.description: 4 distinct question cards capturing the user's padel history.

screens.name: Onboarding Step 3 - Preferences
screens.description: Venues grid, Availability days, Frequency stepper.
elements: Venue grid (real images with ink borders)

screens.name: Onboarding Step 4 - Connections
screens.description: Player search and selection with tap states.
elements: Player list with '+' buttons (lime active states)

screens.name: Onboarding Step 5 - Shot Comfort
screens.description: Detailed evaluation of 36 shots across 5 categories.

screens.name: Rating Reveal
screens.description: Dramatic full-screen reveal of the initial assigned rating.

screens.name: Games Feed
screens.description: List of available and upcoming games.
elements: Game cards with coral header bands and 2px ink borders

screens.name: Game Detail
screens.description: Deep dive into a specific game.

screens.name: Leaderboard
elements: Ranked list using Leaderboard Row component

screens.name: Score Entry
elements: Winner panel gets lime-tinted #EDFAD0 bg post-entry

screens.name: Notifications
elements: List of alerts with DM Sans body

venues_and_courts.description: Padel courts in North Goa (e.g., Round Two Vagator, Sunday Club Siolim). Used in Preferences and Game Feed.

players_action.description: Players in action, handshake moments. Used for avatars, connections, profile headers.

goa_vibe.description: North Goa coastal vibe, sunset, palms. Used for onboarding backgrounds or empty states.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly apply 0px border radius everywhere. No rounded corners.
Use exact hex codes provided. Do not deviate or use default Tailwind shades like gray-200.
Font weights are highly specific: Unbounded 900 for numbers/ratings, 700 for headers/CTA. DM Mono for scores/stats.
Maintain a mobile-first maximum width of 480px, centered horizontally.
Build the application using pure React and standard HTML elements tailored with Tailwind, heavily enforcing the brutalist constraints.
Implement the 5-tab bottom navigation strictly with center tab raised lime.
All interactive elements must include `data-testid` in kebab-case.
